text:
Quantum Computers can never out perform GPUs in CFD

From my reading, GPUs can solve the Poisson problem in O(N) time. With the Omega(N) measurement barrier, quantum computers could never outperform that. Even though HHL is on the scale of polylog(n), it still can't get past the Omega(N) barrier.
